Known Issues Potential conflicts with outdated third-party template kits AMP incompatibility when using complex page builder layouts Community Q&A Are Elementor and WooCommerce Subscriptions compatible? Yes, they are compatible. Elementor allows you to design custom product pages and checkout flows that work seamlessly with WooCommerce Subscriptions.

item.title: Elementor and WP Mail SMTP Compatibility
item.description: Elementor and WP Mail SMTP are fully compatible and function together without any reported technical conflicts in standard WordPress environments. Based on 7 community reports. Linked sources: 7. Known Issues DNS configuration required for SPF and DKIM Transactional email delivery requires proper SMTP setup Community Q&A Are Elementor and WP Mail SMTP compatible? Yes, Elementor and WP Mail SMTP are fully compatible as they operate in different layers of the WordPress ecosystem.

item.title: Elementor and WP Super Cache Compatibility Guide
item.description: Elementor and WP Super Cache are fully compatible, though users should exclude Elementor’s query strings and avoid caching the active page builder interface. Based on 6 community reports. Linked sources: 6. Known Issues Caching the active Elementor editor page can cause loading loops or save failures. Regenerating Elementor CSS may require manually clearing the WP Super Cache. Community Q&A Is WP Super Cache compatible with Elementor? Yes, WP Super Cache is compatible with Elementor.

item.title: Elementor and WPML Compatibility Guide
item.description: While Elementor and WPML are technically compatible, the combination is frequently cited as a major source of site bloat and performance degradation. Based on 8 community reports. Linked sources: 9. Known Issues High database resource usage Slow page load speeds Translation synchronization delays Complex configuration requirements Community Q&A Are Elementor and WPML compatible? Yes, they are compatible, but users often report that the combination creates significant performance issues and requires careful optimization.

item.title: Elementor vs Oxygen Builder Compatibility & Comparison
item.description: Elementor and Oxygen Builder are separate page builders that cannot be used together on the same page, though they can coexist on a single site. Based on 6 community reports. Linked sources: 6. Known Issues Using multiple page builders simultaneously causes severe performance bloat and layout conflicts. Community Q&A Can I use Elementor and Oxygen Builder together on the same WordPress site? While you can technically activate both, it is highly discouraged due to severe performance bloat and potential layout conflicts.

item.title: Astra and Elementor Compatibility Guide
item.description: Astra and Elementor are highly compatible and widely recommended by the community, though users should optimize hosting to prevent performance bloat. Based on 5 community reports. Known Issues Elementor sites can become heavy and require optimized hosting/caching Potential confusion between Astra’s block editor integration and Elementor’s page builder Community Q&A Are Astra and Elementor compatible? Yes, Astra is fully compatible with Elementor. It is one of the most popular theme choices for Elementor users due to its lightweight structure and starter templates.

item.title: Beaver Builder and Elementor Compatibility Guide
item.description: While Elementor and Beaver Builder can technically run on the same site, doing so causes performance issues, so they should be used separately. Based on 5 community reports. Known Issues Running multiple page builders simultaneously slows down page load speeds. Asset loading conflicts between Elementor and Beaver Builder scripts. Community Q&A Can I use Elementor and Beaver Builder together on the same WordPress site? Yes, they can technically run on the same site, but it is highly discouraged due to performance degradation, script conflicts, and redundant asset loading.

item.title: Bricks Builder vs Elementor: Compatibility & Migration
item.description: Bricks Builder and Elementor are mutually exclusive page builders; users overwhelmingly prefer Bricks for its cleaner code and superior performance. Based on 5 community reports. Known Issues Elementor is noted for having unnecessary bloat and slower performance compared to Bricks. Page builders cannot be active on the same page without causing conflicts and performance degradation. Community Q&A Can I use Elementor and Bricks Builder together on the same WordPress site?

item.title: Divi and Elementor Compatibility Guide
item.description: Running Divi and Elementor simultaneously causes severe performance degradation and layout conflicts, so users should choose one or the other. Based on 5 community reports. Known Issues Severe page speed and performance degradation Shortcode clutter when disabling Divi Layout and styling conflicts between builder CSS files Community Q&A Can I run both Divi and Elementor on the same WordPress site? While technically possible, it is highly discouraged because loading two heavy page builder frameworks severely impacts site loading speeds and causes layout conflicts.

item.title: Elementor and Contact Form 7 Compatibility Guide
item.description: Elementor and Contact Form 7 work well together, with CF7 favored for advanced API integrations and Elementor Pro chosen for native design control. Based on 5 community reports. Known Issues Free form builders like Contact Form 7 require additional plugins to save form submissions to the database. Community Q&A Is Contact Form 7 compatible with Elementor? Yes, Contact Form 7 is fully compatible with Elementor. You can easily embed CF7 forms into Elementor layouts using shortcodes or dedicated widgets.

item.title: Elementor and GeneratePress Compatibility Guide
item.description: GeneratePress is highly recommended as a lightweight, stable, and fully compatible theme base for Elementor page builder projects. Based on 5 community reports. Known Issues Potential homepage display issues when assigning static pages in WordPress Reading settings. Community Q&A Is GeneratePress compatible with Elementor? Yes, GeneratePress is highly compatible with Elementor. It is a lightweight, stable theme that does not interfere with Elementor’s builder scripts. Why is GeneratePress recommended for Elementor users?

item.title: Elementor and WooCommerce Compatibility Guide
item.description: Elementor and WooCommerce are highly compatible, but users often face performance bloat that requires optimization plugins, VPS hosting, or lightweight translation alternatives. Based on 5 community reports. Known Issues Performance bloat when combining Elementor, WooCommerce, and heavy translation plugins like WPML. Finding specific niche widgets like WooCommerce Brand displays within standard Elementor grids. Community Q&A Are Elementor and WooCommerce compatible? Yes, Elementor and WooCommerce are fully compatible, allowing you to build custom online stores.

item.title: Elementor and Wordfence Compatibility Guide
item.description: Elementor and Wordfence are highly compatible, though users may need to temporarily enable Wordfence’s Learning Mode to prevent firewall false positives during page editing. Based on 5 community reports. Known Issues Wordfence firewall may occasionally block Elementor’s AJAX saving requests as false positives. Admin actions in Elementor might trigger Wordfence security alerts if Learning Mode is disabled. Community Q&A Are Elementor and Wordfence compatible? Yes, Elementor and Wordfence work well together.

item.title: Elementor and WP Rocket Compatibility Guide
item.description: Elementor and WP Rocket are highly compatible, but users must carefully configure file optimization settings to prevent layout and styling conflicts. Based on 5 community reports. Known Issues Minification of Elementor CSS/JS can sometimes break page layouts Combine Files option in WP Rocket may cause rendering issues with Elementor widgets Community Q&A Are Elementor and WP Rocket compatible? Yes, Elementor and WP Rocket are fully compatible. WP Rocket helps optimize the performance of Elementor-built sites by caching pages and minifying files.

item.title: Elementor and WPForms Compatibility Guide
item.description: Elementor and WPForms are fully compatible, with WPForms offering a dedicated Elementor widget and native email template customization. Based on 5 community reports. Known Issues Outdated theme templates can cause layout breaks Email template customization may require external add-ons or HTML for advanced layouts Community Q&A Are Elementor and WPForms compatible? Yes, WPForms is fully compatible with Elementor and includes a dedicated widget to easily embed forms into your Elementor layouts.

item.title: Elementor and Yoast SEO Compatibility Guide
item.description: Elementor and Yoast SEO are fully compatible and integrate directly, though some users express concern over backend bloat and advertising. Based on 5 community reports. Known Issues Backend advertising and bloat from both plugins can clutter the WordPress dashboard. Potential script conflicts if using multiple redundant Elementor add-ons alongside SEO plugins. Community Q&A Are Elementor and Yoast SEO compatible? Yes, Elementor and Yoast SEO are fully compatible. Yoast SEO includes a dedicated integration that allows you to optimize your content directly within the Elementor live editor.

item.description: The community welcomes WordPress 6.8 as a solid incremental release focused on performance and editor polish, with no major breaking changes reported. Based on 34 Reddit community posts. item.title: About WordPress FAQ
item.description: What is WordPress FAQ? WordPress FAQ is a community-sourced reference site that turns real Reddit discussions into concise, searchable answers about WordPress plugins, themes, and configurations. Every page on this site represents a real question that WordPress users ask — and the answer reflects what the community actually reports, not what plugin vendors claim. How content is generated Crawling — We monitor WordPress-related subreddits (r/Wordpress, r/WPDev, etc.) for recurring questions about plugin and theme compatibility.
